name: Notion
description: A connected workspace for strategy docs, planning notes, meeting decisions, dashboards, and operating templates.
whyUseIt: Notion is useful when strategy keeps living in scattered docs, chats, and meeting memory. It gives founders one place to document priorities, decision logs, and operating cadences.
aiCapabilities: Notion AI can summarise planning notes, draft operating documents, pull action items from long write-ups, and speed up first-pass strategic memos.
